description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a matte black finish and a gently curving, teardrop-shaped body. The bottle features a gold-colored screw cap at the top, which contrasts with the dark body. On one side, the word 'Substance' is written in a cursive, gold script, adding a touch of elegance and branding. The surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible seams or handles. The bottle's overall design is minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and a modern aesthetic. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle appears to be empty or its contents are not visible due to the opaque body.
description: A tall, matte black bottle with a gold screw cap and the word 'Substance' in gold script on one side. The design is sleek, minimalist, and modern.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from a side angle, showing its smooth, matte black surface and gold cap, with only a partial view of the gold script.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the bottle, prominently featuring the gold 'Substance' script on the matte black body and the gold cap.
description_view_2: The bottle is rotated to show the opposite side, with the gold script barely visible at the edge and the matte black surface dominating.
description_view_3: The back of the bottle is visible, showing a plain matte black surface with no text or markings, and the gold cap at the top.
attribute_label_or_branding: The word 'Substance' is written in gold cursive script on one side of the bottle, positioned vertically along the widest part of the body.
